dashboard.welcome: Welcome to Paperclip. Set up your first company and agent to get started.
dashboard.selectCompany: Create or select a company to view the dashboard.
dashboard.incidentDetails: {{agents}} agents paused · {{projects}} projects paused · {{approvals}} pending budget approvals

issues.selectCompany: Select a company to view issues.

agents.selectCompany: Select a company to view agents.
agents.createFirst: Create your first agent to get started.
agents.noMatch: No agents match the selected filter.

goals.selectCompany: Select a company to view goals.

projects.selectCompany: Select a company to view projects.

activity.selectCompany: Select a company to view activity.

newAgentDialog.agentDescription: (type in what kind of agent you want here)
newAgentDialog.recommendation: We recommend letting your CEO handle agent setup — they know the org structure and can configure reporting, permissions, and adapters.
newAgentDialog.askCeo: Ask the CEO to create a new agent
newAgentDialog.chooseAdapter: Choose your adapter type for advanced setup.

costs.selectCompany: Select a company to view costs.
costs.title: Costs
costs.subtitle: Inference spend, platform fees, credits, and live quota windows.
costs.selectDates: Select a start and end date to load data.
costs.financeLedgerDesc: Account-level charges that do not map to a single inference request.
costs.netDesc: Debit minus credit for the selected period
costs.estimatedDesc: Estimated debits that are not yet invoice-authoritative
costs.inferenceLedgerDesc: Request-scoped inference spend for the selected period.
costs.usagePercent: {{percent}}% of monthly budget consumed in this range.
costs.byAgentDesc: What each agent consumed in the selected period.
costs.byProjectDesc: Run costs attributed through project-linked issues.
costs.noFinanceEvents: No finance events yet. Add account-level charges once biller invoices or credits land.
costs.budgetControlPlaneDesc: Hard-stop spend limits for agents and projects. Provider subscription quota stays separate and appears under Providers.
costs.activeIncidentsSubtitle: Open soft or hard threshold crossings
costs.pendingApprovalsSubtitle: Budget override approvals awaiting board action
costs.resolveIncidents: Resolve hard stops here by raising the budget or explicitly keeping the scope paused.
costs.agentBudgetDesc: Recurring monthly spend policies for individual agents.
costs.projectBudgetDesc: Lifetime spend policies for execution-bound projects.
costs.noBudgetPolicies: No budget policies yet. Set agent and project budgets from their detail pages, or use the existing company monthly budget control.
costs.noCostEventsInPeriod: No cost events in this period.
costs.noBillableEvents: No billable events in this period.
costs.byBillerDesc: Account-level financial events grouped by who charged or credited them.

newProjectDialog.repoTooltip: Link a GitHub repository so agents can clone, read, and push code for this project.
newProjectDialog.localFolderTooltip: Set an absolute path on this machine where local agents will read and write files for this project.
